name: Pacific Chicken, Shrimp and Kiwifruit Kebabs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the kiwifruit into bite-sized pieces.
2. Thread the chicken breasts, red bell pepper, red onion slices, and shrimp onto skewers.
3. Place the skewers on a grill or under a broiler to cook until fully heated through.
4. Serve hot.
